_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: AFFiNE
author: pterodactyl@dnaniel213.dev
description: Host AFFiNE — the next-gen knowledge base and workspace — on Pterodactyl. Redis is bundled inside the container. Requires an external PostgreSQL 16+ database. See the README for full setup instructions.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
apk add --no-cache openssl bash 2>/dev/null || true

echo "========================================="
echo "  AFFiNE - Pterodactyl Installer"
echo "  github.com/DNAniel213/affine-self-hosted-pterodactyl-egg"
echo "========================================="
echo ""

mkdir -p /mnt/server/storage
mkdir -p /mnt/server/config
mkdir -p /mnt/server/redis-data
echo "[install] Persistent directories created."
echo ""

cat > /mnt/server/start.sh << 'AFFINE_START_SCRIPT'
#!/bin/bash
echo "========================================="
echo "  AFFiNE - Pterodactyl"
echo "  github.com/DNAniel213/affine-self-hosted-pterodactyl-egg"
echo "========================================="

AFFINE_HOME=""
for candidate in /app /affine /srv/affine /home/affine; do
    if [ -f "$candidate/scripts/self-host-predeploy.js" ]; then
        AFFINE_HOME="$candidate"
        break
    fi
done
if [ -z "$AFFINE_HOME" ]; then
    echo "[ERROR] Cannot locate AFFiNE (scripts/self-host-predeploy.js not found)."
    echo "[ERROR] Is the Docker image set to ghcr.io/dnaniel213/affine-pterodactyl:stable?"
    exit 1
fi
echo "[ptero] AFFiNE found at: $AFFINE_HOME"

mkdir -p /home/container/storage /home/container/config /home/container/redis-data
mkdir -p /root/.affine
rm -f /root/.affine/storage /root/.affine/config
ln -sfn /home/container/storage /root/.affine/storage
ln -sfn /home/container/config  /root/.affine/config
echo "[ptero] Persistent storage symlinks configured."

export AFFINE_SERVER_PORT="${SERVER_PORT:-3010}"
echo "[ptero] Port: $AFFINE_SERVER_PORT"

REDIS_HOST="${REDIS_SERVER_HOST:-localhost}"
if [ "$REDIS_HOST" = "localhost" ] || [ "$REDIS_HOST" = "127.0.0.1" ]; then
    echo "[ptero] Starting bundled Redis..."
    redis-server /etc/redis/redis-ptero.conf \
        --daemonize yes \
        --dir /home/container/redis-data \
        --logfile /home/container/redis.log \
        --loglevel notice
    REDIS_READY=0
    for i in $(seq 1 30); do
        if redis-cli ping 2>/dev/null | grep -q PONG; then
            REDIS_READY=1
            break
        fi
        echo "[ptero]   waiting for Redis ($i/30)..."
        sleep 1
    done
    if [ "$REDIS_READY" != "1" ]; then
        echo "[ERROR] Bundled Redis failed. Check /home/container/redis.log"
        exit 1
    fi
    echo "[ptero] Bundled Redis ready."
else
    echo "[ptero] External Redis: ${REDIS_HOST}:${REDIS_SERVER_PORT:-6379}"
fi

echo "[ptero] Running migration..."
cd "$AFFINE_HOME"
if ! node scripts/self-host-predeploy.js; then
    echo "[ERROR] Migration failed. Verify DATABASE_URL and PostgreSQL 16+ connectivity."
    exit 1
fi
echo "[ptero] Migration complete."

echo "[ptero] Starting AFFiNE server..."
if [ -f "$AFFINE_HOME/packages/backend/server/dist/index.js" ]; then
    exec node "$AFFINE_HOME/packages/backend/server/dist/index.js"
elif [ -f "$AFFINE_HOME/dist/index.js" ]; then
    exec node "$AFFINE_HOME/dist/index.js"
elif [ -f "$AFFINE_HOME/packages/backend/server/dist/main.js" ]; then
    exec node "$AFFINE_HOME/packages/backend/server/dist/main.js"
else
    echo "[ERROR] Cannot find AFFiNE entry point."
    echo "[ERROR] Please report: https://github.com/DNAniel213/affine-self-hosted-pterodactyl-egg/issues"
    ls -la "$AFFINE_HOME/" 2>/dev/null || true
    exit 1
fi
AFFINE_START_SCRIPT

chmod +x /mnt/server/start.sh
echo "[install] Startup script written."
echo ""
PRIVATE_KEY="$(openssl rand -hex 32)"
echo "========================================="
echo "  INSTALLATION COMPLETE"
echo "========================================="
echo ""
echo "  >>> COPY THIS PRIVATE KEY NOW <<<"
echo "  Paste into your server's AFFINE_PRIVATE_KEY variable"
echo "  BEFORE starting. Do NOT change it after data exists."
echo ""
echo "  AFFINE_PRIVATE_KEY=${PRIVATE_KEY}"
echo ""
echo "  REQUIRED BEFORE STARTING:"
echo "  1. Set AFFINE_PRIVATE_KEY  <- the key above"
echo "  2. Set DATABASE_URL        <- PostgreSQL 16+ URI"
echo "     Format: postgresql://user:password@host:5432/dbname"
echo "  3. Set AFFINE_SERVER_HOST  <- your domain or public IP"
echo ""
echo "  BUNDLED REDIS is active by default (REDIS_SERVER_HOST=localhost)."
echo "  To use external Redis, set REDIS_SERVER_HOST to its address."
echo ""
echo "  Full guide:"
echo "  https://github.com/DNAniel213/affine-self-hosted-pterodactyl-egg#readme"
echo "=========================================="

variables.name: AFFiNE Version
variables.description: Release channel for AFFiNE. Must match the Docker image selected above in the Nest tab. Changing this does NOT automatically switch the image — update both.

variables.name: Private Key
variables.description: CRITICAL — 64-char hex key for auth token signing and data encryption. Copy this value from the installer log output. NEVER change it after data has been written to the database — doing so will invalidate all sessions and may corrupt encrypted content.

variables.name: Database URL
variables.description: PostgreSQL 16+ connection string. Format: postgresql://user:password@host:5432/dbname. The database user needs CREATE TABLE and ALTER TABLE permissions. Recommended providers: Supabase (free), Neon (free).

variables.name: Server Domain / Host
variables.description: The hostname where AFFiNE is publicly accessible (e.g. affine.example.com). Used to build invite links, email links, and OAuth callbacks. Use a plain IP for local/testing setups.

variables.name: HTTPS Enabled
variables.description: Set to 'true' if AFFiNE sits behind an SSL-terminating reverse proxy (Nginx, Caddy, Traefik). Determines whether outgoing links are built with https://. Set to 'false' for plain HTTP or local testing.

variables.name: External URL Override
variables.description: Optional. Full base URL including scheme (e.g. https://affine.example.com). If set, this overrides Server Domain + HTTPS Enabled for all external link generation. Leave blank to use the auto-computed value.

variables.name: Redis Host
variables.description: Redis server hostname. Default 'localhost' uses the Redis instance bundled inside this container — no external Redis needed. Change to an external hostname/IP to use a standalone Redis 6.x or 7.x server.

variables.name: Redis Port
variables.description: Redis server port. Leave as 6379 unless using a non-standard external Redis port.

variables.name: Redis Password
variables.description: Redis authentication password. Leave blank for bundled Redis (no auth) or external Redis with no password.

variables.name: Redis Database Index
variables.description: The starting Redis database index for AFFiNE. AFFiNE occupies databases N through N+4. Default 0 is safe. Change only if sharing this Redis instance with other applications.

variables.name: Enable Full-Text Indexer
variables.description: Enables AFFiNE's full-text search indexer. This is CPU and memory intensive. Disabled by default. See https://docs.affine.pro/self-host-affine/administer/indexer before enabling.

variables.name: SMTP Host
variables.description: Hostname of your outbound mail server (e.g. smtp.gmail.com). Leave blank to disable email features (invitations, password reset, notifications).

variables.name: SMTP Port
variables.description: SMTP port. Common values: 465 (SSL), 587 (STARTTLS), 25 (plain). Only used if SMTP Host is set.

variables.name: SMTP Username
variables.description: Username for SMTP authentication. Only used if SMTP Host is set.

variables.name: SMTP Password
variables.description: Password for SMTP authentication. For Gmail, use an App Password (not your Google account password). See https://docs.affine.pro/self-host-affine/administer/email-notifications.

variables.name: SMTP Sender Address
variables.description: The From address for outbound emails. Format: Display Name <email@domain.com>. Example: AFFiNE <noreply@example.com>.
